mapper.select: SELECT post_id, comment_id, create_time, update_time FROM interaction_comment_pin WHERE post_id = #{postId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interaction_comment_pin(post_id, comment_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{postId}, #{commentId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE comment_id = VALUES(comment_id), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM interaction_comment_pin WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND comment_id = #{commentId}
